rules.name: Skill Stacking
rules.principle: Rare skill combinations create monopolies. Stack 3 complementary skills instead of mastering one.
rules.insight_template: What two skills combined with {current_skill} would make you the only person in the room?

rules.name: Leverage Migration
rules.principle: Migrate from time-for-money to asset-for-money as fast as possible.
rules.insight_template: What part of your current work could become a product, system, or content that earns without your hours?

rules.name: Reputation Compounding
rules.principle: Reputation compounds faster than any financial asset. Invest in it early.
rules.insight_template: What one visible win this quarter would most strengthen your reputation in {domain}?

rules.name: Adjacent Possible
rules.principle: The best next move is usually one step adjacent to current strength, not a full pivot.
rules.insight_template: What opportunity is directly adjacent to your current skills that you haven't pursued?

rules.name: Sponsor Not Mentor
rules.principle: Mentors advise. Sponsors advocate. Actively seek sponsors who will put their name behind you.
rules.insight_template: Who in your network has the authority and trust to open the door to {opportunity}?

rules.name: Market Rate Awareness
rules.principle: Never negotiate from ignorance. Know your market rate before every conversation.
rules.insight_template: When did you last benchmark your market rate for {role}? What does current data say?

rules.name: Portfolio Thinking
rules.principle: Treat your career as a portfolio of bets, not a single linear path.
rules.insight_template: Which career bet has the highest asymmetric upside you're currently underweighting?

rules.name: Visible Work
rules.principle: Invisible good work is indistinguishable from no work. Make output visible.
rules.insight_template: How would you make your work on {project} visible to the people who matter?

rules.name: 10-Year Horizon
rules.principle: Most people overestimate 1 year and underestimate 10. Optimize for the decade.
rules.insight_template: What decision looks obviously right from 10 years ahead that you're hesitating on today?

rules.name: Exit Readiness
rules.principle: Always be quietly ready to leave. Security comes from options, not loyalty.
rules.insight_template: If your current role ended tomorrow, how strong is your position? What would you do?
